meta.title: Ads — Smart Paid Traffic Management
meta.description: Manage paid media campaigns with intelligence and automation. Maximize the ROI of your ad spend with Solvefy Ads.

hero.title: Scale your sales with a <accent>cost up to 20% lower</accent> than other Ads.
hero.subtitle: Stop burning budget on saturated platforms and inflated auctions. Solvefy/Ads delivers high-performance qualified traffic with full autonomy. No unfair blocks, no ties to other networks. Just real, scalable results.

problem.title: The end of <accent>evaporating</accent> money. Compare what you pay today to what you could be paying.

before.title: Traditional traffic: you pay a premium and still get held hostage.
before.p1: Acquisition cost grows year after year in inflated auctions.
before.p2: Mandatory ties to closed ecosystems and hidden rules.
before.p3: Constant risk of unfair blocks freezing your operation.

after.title: You in command. No ties, no hostages.
after.subtitle: We don't require ties to other platforms. Stay in control of your operation, diversify your traffic and shield your company from blocks and the hidden rules of the traditional market.
after.p1: CPA up to 20% lower than traditional auctions.
after.p2: CTR up to 35% on optimized campaigns.
after.p3: Continuous, stable traffic with no hidden rules.

stepsFlow.title: From goal to launch in <accent>6 steps</accent>.
stepsFlow.subtitle: A guided flow with AI assisting every critical campaign decision.

objetivo.title: Goal
objetivo.desc: Set the campaign goal and our AI automatically suggests the right creatives and channels for each objective.

setup.title: Setup
setup.desc: Configure the campaign name, run period and target segment in minutes, no technical complexity.

orcamento.title: Budget
orcamento.desc: Set a daily or total cap and track every cent spent in real time, no surprises at closing.

posicionamentos.title: Placements
posicionamentos.desc: Distribute your budget smartly across premium, qualified inventory, maximizing reach with controlled CPA.

publico.title: Audience
publico.desc: Target precisely using behavioral tags and your own 1st party data for higher conversions.

criativos.title: Creatives
criativos.desc: Generate copy, images and CTAs with native generative AI and publish high-performance creatives without an agency.

comparison.title: Solvefy/Ads vs. <accent>the rest of the market</accent>.
comparison.subtitle: Direct comparison with what traditional platforms offer today.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce & Retail
ecommerce.desc: Acquisition and remarketing campaigns with controlled CPA, no inflated auctions.

igaming.title: iGaming & Betting
igaming.desc: Player acquisition at scale, with no risk of unfair blocks.

agencies.title: Marketing Agencies
agencies.desc: Diversify your clients' media mix and shield the operation against dependencies.

saas.title: SaaS & Tech
saas.desc: B2B demand generation with qualified traffic and transparent attribution.

pricing.title: Pricing that <accent>fits your operation</accent>.
pricing.subtitle: Two models to choose how you want to scale, no fine print.

performance.name: More performance
performance.desc: For operations that need every dollar optimized. Up to 20% lower CPA and transparent attribution on every conversion.

reach.name: Faster reach
reach.desc: For those who need to scale qualified impressions quickly, without competing for scroll in a saturated feed.
